title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Mmm! That's good.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, this is, like, your treat, right?
choice_data_list: Of course! We're celebrating all your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sick. I'm gonna invite some friends then.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Thank yooou! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Yeah, thaaanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're sure it's cool? You don't mind paying for us too?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's not like I could celebrate my hard
work without my girls.
choice_data_list: (You don't have to act like it's nothing...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, for real...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could have made it this far
without all of you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You've always had my back, from my debut all
the way to the fall Tenno.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So I just wanna say thank you.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aww, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's eat! City's gonna join up with us at
karaoke. ☆

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Wooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Duh! That totally reminds me, could you reserve
us a room at the karaoke place?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, City just texted. She'll meet us in an hour!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Righto! Then let's get a move on, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yep! ☆ Wait...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: HUH?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yo, what's the big idea anyway? ☆ If you're up to
something fun, you can't not invite good ol'
Golshi! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: So... where we off to?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: It's all good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Allll good! ♪ Just gotta invite Mac too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What's the deal with her?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I texted her yesterday, but she just left me on
read!
choice_data_list: What did you say to her?
What did you say to her?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well... you know, I said thank you and stuff. She's
helped me out quite a bit, in her own way...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Come on! Don't make me say it out loud!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, you're coming with us to karaoke,
Trainer. You've got bodyguard duty.
choice_data_list:
And I have to make sure you all get back before
curfew.

And I have to make sure you all get back before
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No chance you'll budge? You're so uptight. What are you, my bodyguard?
choice_data_list: You're the one who said I am!
You're the one who said I am!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ohh, right! So I did! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we kick off the party to celebrate all of
Tosen Jordan's hard work.
